title: Visit Our Campus
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Visit Our Campus
Anchored in the city, make the world your major. Welcome to the NYU SHANGHAI Welcome Center!
Join us for an in-person tour of our Campus Without Walls. This is the starting point for exploring and experiencing the unique essence of NYU SHANGHAI, offering a gateway to delve deeply into campus culture.
Our student ambassadors will guide small groups on a comprehensive campus tour, exploring various facilities such as Study Spaces, Visual Arts Studio, Center for Career Development, Academic Advising, Academic Resource Center, Library, IT Services, Fitness Center, Interactive Media Arts.
Gain insights into the array of hardware and software resources available to students, and immerse yourself in our campus culture, characterized by cross-cultural exchange and innovation. These smaller tours offer a more personalized experience. Total time for the event is approximately 90 minutes.
In-Person Campus Tour
Whether you are applying through our Chinese or international admissions process, there are ways to connect and learn more!
For International Guests
BORDER DO NOT TOUCH
Before arranging your visit, you are required to verify your eligibility to apply to our institution by visiting this link. Upon confirming your eligibility, please proceed to this link to select your preferred date and time for the visit. Follow the steps to complete your appointment.
For Chinese Guests
BORDER DO NOT TOUCH
Please make your appointment through our official WeChat account“上海纽约大学”and follow the steps to schedule your visit. The tour will be conducted in Chinese.Please make your appointment through our official WeChat account. The tour will be conducted in Chinese.
Virtual Campus Tour
Use our Virtual Campus Tour tool to discover spaces that aren't typically available during an in-person campus tour. Explore laboratories, dance and fine arts studios, residence halls, and even some of the city’s most popular locations. Even better, it's available 24 hours a day!
Take a Virtual Tour of Our Campus and Residence Halls
Welcome Center
Pick up a brochure, watch videos or speak to a student or staff member about NYU SHANGHAI. The Welcome Center is open Monday through Friday (except public holidays).
Hours: 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM, 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM
Location: 533 Chuntiao Road, Pudong New District, Shanghai, China 200124
Contact: +86-21-2059-5580
Public Transportation: Oriental sports center, Metro Lines 6/8/11 Exit 3
